item.text: {"id":"urn:molaug-v0:hot","verdict":"REPAIR","gloss_scholarly":true,"explication_carries_gloss":false,"self_flag_correct":false,"sense_collision_free":true,"reason":"The rendering limits flesh-harm to sustained contact and leaves nearby feeling unspecified; revise the gloss/self-flag or add the claimed any-duration harm and a heat sensation."}
